description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages install, build, staging, and production using the spaceywolfi/ukuvota-node Docker image for Node/Yarn jobs and the mrsixw/concourse-rsync-resource image for deployment jobs. In the install stage add an install job that runs `yarn`, caches the `node_modules/` directory, and stores it as an artifact that expires in 20 minutes. In the build stage add a build job that runs `yarn build` and publishes the `dist` directory as an artifact, a build-storybook job that runs `yarn build-storybook` and publishes `storybook-static`, a lint job that runs `yarn lint`, and a test job that runs `yarn test --ci`. In the staging stage add a staging job that runs only on the master branch, sets `DEPLOY_DIR=staging`, and executes `eval $(ssh-agent -s)`, `ssh-add <(echo "$DEPLOY_SSH_KEY")`, `mkdir -p ~/.ssh`, `[[ -f /.dockerenv ]] && echo -e "Host *
	StrictHostKeyChecking no

" > ~/.ssh/config`, then `rsync -av --delete dist/ ukuvota-deploy@yuca.yunity.org:/var/www/ukuvota/$DEPLOY_DIR/frontend/` and `rsync -av --delete storybook-static/ ukuvota-deploy@yuca.yunity.org:/var/www/ukuvota/$DEPLOY_DIR/storybook/`. In the production stage add a production job similar to staging but with `DEPLOY_DIR=production`, also limited to the master branch, triggered manually, and defines the production environment URL https://ukuvota.world.
